productName: lil' Rays - Huckleberry Lemonade - 100mg THC : 100mg CBD : 10mg CBN
description: A chef-inspired sweet-tart lemonade cannabis drink made for sipping cold, with bright flavor, a clean finish, and a smooth infused lift. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift, CBD to keep things calm and balanced, and CBN to help you relax and ease into rest. Best enjoyed cold, with plenty of time for the infused finish to arrive.
